reviewFocus: Check whether the cadence recommendation stays analysis-only and avoids implying spend, execution, escalation, or policy approval.
Flag cadence claims that are not proportional to the supplied synthetic evidence labels or that hide missing evidence freshness checks.
Check that recovery-load caveats remain explicit instead of being flattened into confident schedule recommendations.
Keep threshold policy, financial interpretation, scheduling, approval, and real-world routing caller-owned.
outOfScope: Do not infer real budget health, account state, runway, portfolio posture, tax posture, payment urgency, or regulatory obligations.
Do not approve schedule changes, spend, transfers, filings, outreach, alerts, or irreversible follow-up.
Do not treat the fixture as a private finance memo, company operating record, or investment recommendation.
